Our Story

Built in Narela.
Known across India.

What began in 1998 as a wire drawing unit in Narela Industrial Area has grown into one of Delhi's most respected copper wire manufacturers — a fully integrated facility producing everything from bare conductor to finished insulated cable under one roof.

"Copper is a living material. Every micron of its processing defines whether it carries power or fails under load."
Narela has been the heart of Delhi's industrial manufacturing belt for decades, and Fiable Cables has grown with it. Our plant spans over 5 acres, houses 48 drawing lines, and operates continuous casting equipment that converts copper cathode into rod stock in a single controlled pass.

We supply bare wire, stranded conductors, winding wire, power cable, and flexible/control cables to cable manufacturers, motor winders, switchgear makers, EPC contractors, and exporters. Our laboratory team runs metallurgical verification on every production lot, and our QMS has been ISO 9001 certified for over fifteen years.
ISO 9001:2015 BIS Certified RoHS Compliant IEC 60228 Narela, Delhi MSME Registered
Manufacturing Process

From cathode
to finished reel.

Copper Cathode Receipt
Grade A copper cathode (≥99.97% Cu) received, sampled, and batch-recorded against supplier certificate.
Casting & Rolling
Cathode melted, continuously cast, and hot-rolled into 8mm copper rod. OF variants processed under inert atmosphere.
Wire Drawing
48 lines reduce rod 8mm → 0.05mm with inline annealing to restore ductility and conductivity throughout.
Stranding & Insulation
Wires stranded to spec, then insulated with PVC, XLPE, LSZH, or enamel per product type and application.
QC & Dispatch
100% electrical & spark testing, dimensional checks, certificate issue. Full batch traceability. 48hr despatch.

Every form.
Every application.

Bare Wire
Bare Annealed Copper Wire
Soft-drawn ETP copper wire for weaving, braiding, earthing, and conductor manufacture. Available in bundles and reels.
Gauge Range0.10 mm – 8.00 mm
Purity≥ 99.97% Cu (ETP)

Resistivity≤ 17.241 nΩ·m at 20°C

Hard Drawn Copper Wire
Work-hardened copper wire for overhead lines, bus bars, and high tensile strength applications without annealing.

Elongation≥ 1% (hard drawn)

Why Fiable Cables

The Narela difference.

Fully Integrated Plant

Cathode to finished cable under one roof in Narela. No outsourced drawing, no third-party stranding. Total process control and consistent quality lot-to-lot.

In-House Metallurgy Lab

Dedicated metallurgists verify grain structure, DC resistance, tensile strength, and elongation on every production lot before despatch approval.

Full Batch Traceability

Every reel shipped carries a traceable record from the cathode batch it originated from. Test certificates issued per lot with unique batch references.

48-Hour Despatch

Stocked gauges despatched within 48 hours from our Narela warehouse. Custom profiles and alloy grades on negotiated lead times.
